description_long: This is a large, rectangular chest of drawers with a dark wood finish and a flat, broad top surface. The front features two columns of drawers, each column containing five drawers, for a total of ten drawers. Each drawer is equipped with a metallic bar pull handle, giving the piece a modern yet classic appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the same dark wood finish and no additional features or embellishments. The chest sits on a slightly recessed base, providing stability and a subtle visual lift. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as offices, workshops, or garages, offering ample storage and a sturdy surface for placing items.
description: A large, dark wood chest of drawers with ten metallic bar pull handles and a broad, flat top. The design is simple and functional, with a modern yet classic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two columns of five drawers each, all with metallic bar pull handles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the plain, dark wood side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned dark wood back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, dark wood panel.
